name: Rhubarb Dream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend crust ingredients: flour, sugar, and butter.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased 9-inch x 9-inch pan.
4. Mix topping ingredients: eggs, remaining sugar, flour, salt, and rhubarb.
5. Spoon the topping over the crust.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :30
